name: speedytapper-poc
description: Installable browser proof of concept for SpeedyTapper.

scripts.check: node --check src/config.js && node --check src/game-engine.js && node --check src/main.js && node --check src/music-controller.js && node --check src/sound-controller.js && node --check lib/leaderboard-model.js && node --check api/leaderboard.js && node --check scripts/dev-server.mjs && node --test
